title: helianthus parishii f. oliveri
intro: Helianthus parishii f. oliveri, also known as the Parish's sunflower or Oliver's sunflower, is a variety of flowering plant in the genus Helianthus and is a part of the daisy family. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that may have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helianthus parishii f. oliveri include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
